bead.title: artifacts: fix mediaType wildcard + wire frontend q to server search + sort + staleness arg
bead.description: Backend artifacts query already has mediaType (broken — exact equality for image/* fails) and search (over title+path), unused by frontend. Frontend does client-side search over loaded edges only — incorrect past page 1. Fix mediaType wildcard handling, wire frontend q to server search arg, add sort enum (id/path/modified/title/depsCount) with (sortKey, id) tie-breaker, add staleness arg.
bead.acceptance: 1. resolver_artifacts.go: mediaType supports prefix match for X/* patterns. 2. Frontend +page.svelte calls server search with q (not client-side filter). 3. New sort enum + staleness arg in GraphQL schema. 4. (sortKey, id) tie-breaker preserves stable cursor pagination. 5. Tests: cli/internal/server/...artifacts test pass.
